snapshots.sections_text:
PART: Expenses
NAME: Expenses
STATUS: draft

TYPE: Expense Entry
MARKER: expense_entry
INTENT: record individual purchases
---
Each expense has an amount, description, date, and assigned category. The description helps remember what was purchased while the category links it to the appropriate budget limit. ---

STATE: Expense History
MARKER: expense_history
INTENT: track all spending records
---
The app stores every expense entry with its details and automatically calculates totals by category and date ranges. This running history enables budget tracking and spending analysis. ---

STRUCTURE: Expense Input Form
MARKER: expense_input_form
INTENT: capture new expenses quickly
---
A simple form appears with fields for amount, description, category dropdown, and date picker. The interface prioritizes speed since users often log expenses on the go. ---

WHEN: Record New Expense
MARKER: record_new_expense
INTENT: log recent purchase
---
User enters the expense amount, adds a description, selects a category, and confirms the date. The expense saves immediately and updates the category's current spending total and remaining budget. ---
